ocr_findings.description: OCR header reads '試験にはつしが出る！' — the mascot character name 'コシ' is misread as 'つし'; cosmetic brand text, no content impact.
Image shows a partial page (starts mid-content from previous page) with 試験ポイント callout at top, then 生産方式 section heading. OCR captures the callout bullets and section content correctly.
The 受注生産方式と見込生産方式のメリット・デメリット table in OCR is correctly reproduced with 3 columns (生産方式, 在庫リスク, 受注から出荷までの時間) matching the image.

reviewer_notes: Page contains learning content about CAD/CAM summary callout and 生産方式 explanations (受注生産方式, 見込生産方式, JIT生産方式) with a 3-column table. OCR faithfully captures all body text and the table. The mascot brand name misread ('つし' vs 'コシ') is a recurring low-severity pattern. Page footer '148' in image corresponds to pipeline page_164 offset.
